overview: NuclearEdu is a professional-grade interactive educational platform for nuclear science and engineering. It features cinematic 3D visualizations, advanced simulation tools, a comprehensive learning lab with quizzes, and live nuclear database integration — all built for students, professionals, and researchers.
features: Reactor Digital Twin with split-pane comparison modal and cinematic Cherenkov glow effects
Live IAEA isotope database integration with auto-refresh and graceful fallback
Learning Lab with quizzes, achievement badges, streak tracking, and local progress persistence
Advanced Decay Chain Explorer with secular equilibrium curves and gamma-ray spectroscopy
High-fidelity 3D Nucleus Visualizer with decay mode animations and binding energy graphs
Carbon Dating Calculator with IntCal20 calibration and sample presets
Interactive Chart of Nuclides heatmap with 720+ isotopes
Data Explorer with enriched fields from live IAEA data
Radiation Safety deep-dive with dose reference chart
200+ term glossary with multi-level definitions and equations
